name: webui
description: Web UI for agent interaction — login, chat, session management

enabled.description: Whether this extension is enabled. Set to false to disable the extension entirely.

apiKey.description: API key for login authentication. Falls back to HOTDOG_WEBUI_API_KEY env var.

sessionTokenTtlMin.description: Session token TTL in minutes (default: 24 hours)

cli:subcommands.name: webui
cli:subcommands.description: Start the WebUI server (HTTP + WebSocket + frontend)
